summary: Tunnel fits are armor. Mahomes (and every other star QB) walks the tunnel like Maddy walks into East Highland — already winning, before anyone has scored.
Cade is the Pistons' redemption arc. Was Cal Weaver in the Gap suit. Now he's the team's Rue — the one we're all rooting for to make it.
The defensive end as the Nate of every play — uninvited, devastating, and the QB never sees him coming.
evidence: Best edge rusher since Lawrence Taylor

show_character: Lexi Howard (the underestimated one who delivers)
summary: Lexi was the wallflower who wrote a play that exposed everyone. LaPorta was the rookie nobody talked about who broke the Lions wide open.
evidence: Detroit became dangerous because of him
